result.stdout:
Description:
  Sheetly CLI - Google Sheets ORM Tool

Usage:
  Sheetly.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  migrations  Manage migrations
  database    Manage the database
  scaffold    Scaffold model classes from remote provider

Options:

Commands:
  migrations  Manage migrations
  database    Manage the database
  scaffold    Scaffold model classes from remote provider

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage the database

Usage:
  Sheetly.CLI database [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  update  Apply migrations to the database
  drop    Drop the database (clear sheets)

  drop    Drop the database (clear sheets)

result.stdout:
Description:
  Drop the database (clear sheets)

Usage:
  Sheetly.CLI database drop [options]

Options:
  -f, --force
  -p, --project <project>
  -n, --no-build           Do not build project
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Apply migrations to the database

Usage:
  Sheetly.CLI database update [options]

Options:
  -p, --project <project>  Manual path to DLL
  -n, --no-build           Do not build project before action
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage migrations

Usage:
  Sheetly.CLI migrations [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  add <name>  Add a new migration
  remove      Remove the last migration
  list        List all migrations
  script      Generate a schema script from the latest snapshot

commands.payload:
Description:

Options:

  remove      Remove the last migration
  list        List all migrations
  script      Generate a schema script from the latest snapshot

result.stdout:
Description:
  Add a new migration

Usage:
  Sheetly.CLI migrations add [<name>] [options]

Arguments:
  <name>  Migration name

Options:
  -p, --project <project>
  -n, --no-build
  -o, --output-dir <output-dir>
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information
